property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: DraftList should create
DraftList showNoSelection should be true when no division is selected and not loading
DraftList showNoSelection should be false when a specific division is selected
DraftList showNoSelection should be false when All Divisions sentinel is selected
DraftList showTable should be false when no division is selected
DraftList showTable should be true when a division is selected and not loading
DraftList showTable should be false when loading even with a division selected
DraftList sortedPlayers should return players unchanged for a specific division
DraftList sortedPlayers should sort players by division name when All Divisions is selected
DraftList sortedPlayers should not mutate the original players array when sorting
DraftList sortedPlayers should return empty array when no players
DraftList effect: getDraftList should call getDraftList when both season and division are set
DraftList effect: getDraftList should not call getDraftList when only season is set
DraftList effect: getDraftList should not call getDraftList when only division is set
DraftList effect: getDraftList should pass null divisionId when All Divisions sentinel is selected
DraftList downloadCSV should show snackbar when there are no players
DraftList downloadCSV should trigger file download when players exist
DraftList downloadCSV should include division description in filename for a specific division
DraftList downloadCSV should use "All" in filename when All Divisions is selected
DraftList DOB column formatter should format ISO date string as mm-dd-yyyy
DraftList DOB column formatter should zero-pad single-digit month and day
DraftList DOB column formatter should return empty string for null
DraftList DOB column formatter should return empty string for undefined
